title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SINDANGAN EXTENSION OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, March 20, 2025 p.12

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12125, March 14, 2025 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SINDANGAN EXTENSION OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINDANGAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The existing Land Transportation Office (LTO) Extenson Office in Sindangan, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is hereby converted into a regular district office.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the abovementioned regular district office in the Second District of Zamboanga del Norte, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Extension Office located in Sindangan, Zamboanga del Norte. Thereafter, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on September 18, 2023 and December 17, 2024, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 14 2025

(

SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
